semantics: One operating registry for IP estates. A shelf, crawler mapping or paused scope is not certification. Each estate advances through explicit source, adapter, preservation, semantic-review and operating gates before it may issue corpus leases.

estates.label: Star Trek
estates.next_gate: Continue one zero-debt rolling cycle at a time; complete two further successful cycles and current five-way accounting without halting collection afterward.

estates.label: Doctor Who
estates.next_gate: Review exact actor extraction and source receipts against the corrected producer, preserve a complete snapshot, then certify paused.

estates.label: Star Wars
estates.next_gate: Review portrayal-category semantics, Legends separation and exact performer-role receipts, then certify paused.

estates.label: Muppets & Henson
estates.next_gate: Review puppeteer-versus-character demotion over regenerated data and preserve exact revisions before certification.

estates.label: Power Rangers
estates.next_gate: Review suit-actor and voice/physical mode extraction, regenerate, preserve and certify paused.

estates.label: Kaiju
estates.next_gate: Define character-role identity from performer-category evidence without treating a performer page as a completed role adapter.

estates.label: Tokusatsu
estates.next_gate: Define exact suit-role mapping across mixed franchises before adapter construction.

estates.label: Babylon 5
estates.next_gate: Inventory source categories, credit fields, revision identity and rights constraints; do not create a scope until the source model is written.

estates.label: Farscape
estates.next_gate: Inventory performer, puppeteer, creature and voice credit semantics before creating an adapter scope.
